articles.gettingStartedBody: Create an account, set up your profile, and go live in minutes.
articles.giftsAndCoinsBody: Send gifts to creators. Coins are the in-app currency; purchase and use in the shop or during streams.
articles.payoutsBody: Creators earn from gifts, subscriptions, and sales. Payouts are processed weekly to your connected bank account.
articles.safetyBody: We take safety seriously. Review our community guidelines and report any violations.
articles.technicalIssuesBody: Having trouble streaming or with the app? Check our troubleshooting guide or contact support.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.buyCoinsAnswer: Visit the shop or coin pack page.
faq.startStreamingAnswer: Go to the Live tab and tap 'Go Live'.
faq.reportUser: How do I report a user?
faq.reportUserAnswer: Tap the user's profile, then select 'Report'.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.seoDesc: Millo Terms of Service. Use of the platform is subject to these terms.
terms.s1Body: By accessing or using Millo ("Platform"), you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.
terms.s2Body: You must be at least 13 years of age (or the minimum age in your jurisdiction) to use the Platform. You are responsible for your conduct and content. Do not violate laws or our policies.
terms.s3Body: You retain rights to your content; you grant us a license to operate and display it on the Platform. We may remove content that violates our policies. Our Copyright & DMCA Policy describes how we handle copyright claims. You may submit a DMCA report via our DMCA form or POST /legal/dmca-report.
terms.s4Body: You may not upload or use copyrighted music without proper authorization; the platform may block or remove such content. We may mute, remove, or restrict access to content that violates our policies or receives a valid DMCA notice. The Platform owns or licenses the rights to the music and sounds in our official music library; use is subject to the applicable license terms and you do not acquire ownership of those works.
terms.s5Body: Coins, gifts, and paid features are subject to our payment terms. Refunds are handled per our refund policy and applicable law.
terms.s6Body: We may suspend or terminate your access for breach of these terms. You may stop using the Platform at any time.
terms.s7Body: For questions about these terms, contact us via the Help Center or at https://milloapp.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.seoDesc: Millo Privacy Policy. How we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.s1Body: We collect account information (email, profile), usage data, device information, and content you provide. We use cookies and similar technologies as described in our Cookie notice. We collect device-related information such as browser type, IP address, and system configuration to help prevent fraud and secure accounts. We may analyze interaction patterns (mouse movement, clicks, and typing timing—not what you type) for the same purposes.
privacy.s2Body: We use data to operate the Platform, personalize experience, process payments, enforce policies, and communicate with you. We do not sell your personal data to third parties for their marketing.
privacy.s3Body: You may access, correct, or request deletion of your data. You may export your data (DSAR) via the app or compliance tools. Withdraw consent where applicable. Contact us for requests.
privacy.s4Body: We use essential and optional cookies. You can manage cookie preferences via the cookie consent banner and settings. See our Cookie notice for details.
privacy.s5Body: For privacy requests or questions: Help Center or https://milloapp.com.
privacy.s6Body: To protect the platform and your account, we may process device and network signals as described above. We may analyze interaction patterns (for example mouse movement, clicks, and typing timing—not the characters you type) to detect fraud and protect accounts. Where we offer it in your in-product privacy settings, you may opt out of optional device fingerprint collection; the app will not send those signals for that account. We may still use information that is necessary for security, fraud prevention, and legal compliance (for example, IP address on login or payment screens when required).
privacy.optOutFpDesc: Turn off optional device fingerprint collection for fraud prevention on this account. Some protections may be reduced. We may still process data needed for security and legal compliance.
privacy.optOutFpLabel: Opt out of device fingerprint collection
privacy.settingsDesc: Export or delete your data (GDPR, CCPA, LGPD)
privacy.exportDesc: Get a copy of your personal data in JSON format.
privacy.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteConfirmDesc: Type DELETE below to confirm. This action cannot be undone.

cookie.message: We use cookies and similar technologies as described in our <privacyLink>Privacy</privacyLink> and cookie notice. By continuing, you accept optional cookies or you can manage preferences.

coinStore.seoDesc: Buy Millo Coins to send gifts, unlock pay-per-view streams, and support your favourite creators.
coinStore.step1Desc: Choose the coin pack that fits your budget. Bigger packs include bonus coins — prices adjusted for your region.
coinStore.step2Desc: Watch live streams or explore creators. Use coins to unlock pay-per-view content.
coinStore.step3Desc: Show appreciation with virtual gifts during live streams. 80% goes directly to the creator.
coinStore.faq1A: Coins are the in-app currency used to send virtual gifts, unlock pay-per-view streams, and support creators directly.
coinStore.faq2A: No. Coins never expire once purchased. They stay in your wallet until you spend them.
coinStore.faq3A: No — we use regional pricing so that Millo is accessible and fairly priced for every market. Your local price is shown automatically.
coinStore.faq4Q: How do I send coins to a creator?
coinStore.faq4A: Open any live stream or creator profile, tap the Gift button, choose a gift, and confirm the send. Coins are debited instantly.
coinStore.faq5A: Coin purchases are final and non-refundable except where required by law. Contact support if you believe a charge was in error.
coinStore.faq6A: 100 Millo Coins = $1.00 USD. Bonus coins on larger packs give you more value for money.
coinStore.regionalDesc: Prices are adjusted for {{country}} ({{tier}} market) — {{discount}}% discount vs. standard US pricing.

milla.seoTitle: Milla — AI Style Companion on Millo
milla.seoDesc: Milla is Millo's AI virtual influencer — a 3D fashion and lifestyle creator available 24/7 on live streams, shop drops, and more.
milla.bio: AI Fashion and Lifestyle Creator. Sustainable Style. Tech-Forward. Available around the clock for live streams, product drops and community interactions.
milla.ctaTitle: Interested in AI-powered creators on your platform?
milla.ctaDesc: Reach out to the Millo team to learn how to integrate AI creators into your experience.
milla.cap0Desc: Milla can host live events around the clock, adapting tone and outfits to any audience.
milla.cap1Desc: Curated AI-selected fashion and lifestyle collections, updated in real time.
milla.cap2Desc: Responds to viewer messages using NLP with on-brand personality.
milla.cap3Desc: Animated reactions to every gift tier — from a smile to a full runway walk.
milla.spec1Value: 52 viseme TTS-sync for natural speech animation
milla.spec3Value: Generative outfit & mood selection per stream context
milla.spec4Value: Millo Live SDK — gifts, reactions, subscriber badges
milla.comingSoonDesc: This AI creator experience is not enabled on this deployment yet. Explore the feed and live directory in the meantime.

sellerOnboarding.title: Seller verification
sellerOnboarding.persistedHint: Your business details are saved to your account. Complete document and bank verification through your commerce integration (POST /shop/seller-verification) when you are ready to sell.
sellerOnboarding.stateDraft: Next: submit identity documents, address, and payout details via the seller verification API or your dashboard integration.
sellerOnboarding.stateInReview: Your seller verification is under review. We will notify you when there is an update.
sellerOnboarding.stateApproved: Your seller verification is approved. You can list products subject to storefront rules.
sellerOnboarding.stateRejected: Your previous verification was not approved. Update your details below and work with support if you need help.
sellerOnboarding.stripeErr: Could not start Stripe Connect. You must be an approved creator and Stripe must be configured on the server.
sellerOnboarding.stripeBlurb: Connect a Stripe Express account for creator payouts (requires approved creator status).
